Home → Demo Hub → Runtime Division

Controlled runtime scaling

Runtime Division

MVP-58 1,000-Agent Runtime Division is a real backend-connected control surface for a supervised, lane-scoped, subdivision-scoped runtime division. It keeps command execution disabled, uses chunked activation controls, and writes persistent runtime records through Supabase.

MVP-58 1,000-Agent Runtime Division Runtime division size: 1,000 Live runtime agents enabled: 0–1,000 Activation beyond 1,000: blocked Runtime activation: not started
Full 47,979 activation: blocked Command execution: disabled Deploy execution: disabled Rollback execution: disabled Alert sending: disabled
Runtime division size 1,000 Approved supervised agents
Live runtime agents enabled 0–1,000 Controlled by backend state
Subdivisions 10 10 lanes per subdivision
Lanes 100 10 agents per lane
Registered agents 47,979 Total registry remains blocked from full activation
Kill switch Visible Safety boundary remains visible

Safety Boundary

Full 47,979 activation: blocked.

Activation beyond 1,000: blocked.

Command execution: disabled.

Deploy execution: disabled.

Rollback execution: disabled.

Alert sending: disabled.

Service role remains server-side only.

Request builder

Controlled action and note submission

Every action calls a Netlify function and persists through Supabase.

Kill switch visible. It remains a visible safety boundary and is not executable from this page.
